ocr_impact.query: What are the four AI RMF core functions?
ocr_impact.impact: Figure region summaries provide high-signal terms even when narrative prose is short, helping function-name retrieval.
ocr_impact.mitigation: Figure specialist routing is triggered for figure/chart/diagram questions to improve synthesis grounding.

ocr_impact.query: How are stakeholder expectations connected to technical requirements?
ocr_impact.observed_text: SE Process ... Stakeholder Expectations ... Customer Requirements ... Technical Requirements...
ocr_impact.impact: Table extraction captures process relationships that are often split across lines in plain OCR text blocks.
ocr_impact.mitigation: Region-linked chunking keeps table semantics available at answer time for cited retrieval evidence.

ocr_impact.query: What diagram is shown in the early systems engineering overview?
ocr_impact.impact: Scanned figure noise causes unstable OCR tokens and can reduce direct hit rate for figure-specific prompts.
ocr_impact.mitigation: Using multiple retrieved sources plus specialist synthesis helps recover answer quality when one region is noisy.
